title: Step 3: Create vision sequence to find calibration reference targets
description:
Step 3: Create vision sequence to find calibration reference targets

Step 3: Create vision sequence to find calibration reference targets

Create a sequence to locate the calibration targets.  You can create one object for each target, or you can create one object to find all nine targets, provided that the object can return multiple results (e.g. Blob, Correlation, or Geometric objects).
After creating the sequence, test that is finds all nine points.
